The Darling is a magnificent book, far ranging and very compelling. Russell Banks, like Wally Lamb, writes authentically in the voice of a woman, so much so that it is hard to believe this book was really written by a man. The woman's voice is that of Hannah Musgrave Sundiata, a.k.a. Dawn Carrington, the darling of the title. What a misnomer! She is anything but darling. Selfish, self-absorbed and admittedly lacking any maternal instinct whatsoever, Hannah is not a sympathetic character, in spite of all she endures, nor even a very likeable one. This is a story of a political radical's flight to W. Africa and her subsequent marriage to a black Liberian, which results in the births of three children. It is, of course, a tale of politics, race relations, and terrorism. But it is also a story of one woman's efforts to learn about herself and to make a life of value. Whether she ever succeeds at this goal is debatable. This book made me want to immediately delve into anything written by Russell Banks!

Boss Monster is a light card game for 2-4 players, that takes about 30 minutes (give or take depending on experience and number of players). In this game, each player takes control of a boss from an 8-bit video game RPG. You must build a fiendish and deadly dungeon, and lure heroes into it with the kind of loot that they like, in order to brutally murder them. You use Room cards to build the dungeon, and Spell cards to aid you (or hinder your opponents). If your dungeon is strong enough, you will kill the heroes and collect them as "souls" (points). If the dungeon is too weak, the heroes will break through and wound you. Any boss who takes five wounds is killed and out of the game. But the first boss to survive and gain ten souls is the winner. This is a solid, fast-paced card game. The theme is fantastic and I love the look of the cards. In fact, everything about the game just screams "fun" at first glance, right down to the parody art of famous video games and other pop culture figures. In fact, why the game succeeds is because the theme is tied so strongly to the mechanics, and they blend well, even though it's a very simple game. It does have some faults. The rulebook could use some work and does not clarify certain basic rules. There's also something of a runaway leader problem (in our game of four, two of us were WAY ahead of the pack by an early point of the game). It's also a game that is already starved for expansions...replay value is questionable. However, the game itself is very enjoyable for now, and I plan on playing it much more. Kudos to the Brothers for their successful Kickstarter, which amounted to a fine game.

DEEP BLUE ALIBI by Paul Levine is a winner all around. The mystery investigation and court scenes are intellectually stimulating and correct with a real "got chya" factor. The relationship between Steve Solomon (who is as clever and smart as the Bible's King Solomon, who decides to offer to divide a baby in half in order to find it's real mother) and Victoria Lord (whose brains, beauty, and emotional issues would via for Dr. Phil status with any God) are perfect characters to keep the mystery alive. Then add in [...] Bobbie, live-in nephew of Solomon whose "savant" traits make for more humor and interesting discoveries of facts for the reader. This book is an easy sell. Evanovich for those who like to be classified as "intellectual snobs". Bring on the whole series, and hurry please!!

The box showed up a little squished, but the chews inside were fine. My pup sniffed them out immediately and started gnawing away. They're a nice size for a medium dog and don't seem too hard. Wish the packaging was sturdier, but first impressions are pretty good overall.

I grabbed this to replace the flimsy toggle on my woodworking dust collector. The specs looked overbuilt for my 1HP motor, so I figured it'd be bulletproof. Install was straightforward, and it's held up through a month of heavy cycling. Only minor gripe is the toggle feels a little stiff out of the box, but it's loosening up. Solid value overall.
I couldn't put this down, the vivid character depth made me feel like I was walking right beside Dinah through every hardship.
Arrived in perfect shape, and I dove right in.

This wedding ring set arrived very quickly. It really is a very nice set at a very reasonable cost. It arrived in a very beautiful black velvet ring box. I would not plan to wear this as an everyday ring set, since it is not a full white gold, just white gold plated, I would not expect it to hold up as well. I like to wear different rings for different occasions, especially when traveling, so I don't have to worry about losing my actual ring set or having it stolen. This set is very dainty looking and quite nice. I ordered a size 7, which is what my original set is, and it fits perfectly. It's very comfortable to wear. I take it off to wash my hands and I wouldn't sleep in it, so I have not seen any discoloration on the metal or on my hands. For the price that this is offered at, I would definitely recommend it for someone to purchase as an extra set to wear on occasion. Like most online shoppers, I read through reviews posted by others to determine whether I want to try out a product. I always do what I can to help by describing my purchases honestly. If I have been helpful please check yes, that it was helpful to you and I will do the same for all of the helpful reviews I find! Thank you for reading.
Showed up super fast in a sturdy box, no dents at all. Pulled it out and immediately knew it was solid quality. Stoked to finally have one.
Works great! just be careful of putting to much cleaner on your dash but even with that you have to take corner pretty fast to get this to slide. I would def buy again
It's solid, grippy, and exactly what I needed for daily workouts. Totally worth it.

Matt Reeves, director of Cloverfield, surprisingly does a great job at remaking a movie that has just come out a year ago on dvd. I truly enjoyed the film even though I saw original. I really like both of these little actors. I can see great things in both of their futures, especially Chloe =) Anyway I saw someone say if you haven't seen original then your not missing anything and that this one suffice. I agree with that person and would surprisingly say just watch this one. I enjoyed it a little more than the original to be quite honest. I will definitely be adding this to the collection soon. A good eerie, slow, wonderfully composed, thriller with a different outlook on vampires and children who get bullied. I suggest this to many. I hope I've been helpful.

I loved this tongue in cheek movie. It made fun of our macho superstar/sex symbols, who, true to Hollywood style, are usually, cool, smooth, strong and handsome idols. Clooney and Pitt were a scream, and Malkovich his usual hysterical self.
This is a movie I have enjoyed many times since the 80's. Like "The Magic Christian" and "Blazing Saddles", it is comedy with a bite.

I picked this up for a hybrid work setup and it's been flawless. Pairs instantly with my laptop and tablet, and the typing feel is surprisingly crisp for something so portable. The compact layout took me a day to get used to, but now I fly through emails. Battery just keeps going, I genuinely forget it even needs charging. I'd recommend this to anyone who commutes or works from coffee shops regularly. Just know it really needs a flat surface; couch typing isn't its strong suit.
Love love love the feeling of bamboo sheets but the fitted sheet does not fit the thicker mattress well at all. Pops off the mattress every night we've used them.
I paid so little for a series this gripping, every twist kept me guessing, and the finale totally delivered. Solid bang for your buck if you want a binge-worthy, unpredictable read.

For over two hundred bucks, I expected way more than a box of confusing parts and a blurry photocopied manual. The assembly was a nightmare, missing bolts, flimsy straps that frayed immediately, and zero help when I reached out. Emails went ignored for a week. When I finally got a reply, they wanted another $40 for what should've been included hardware. My pup used it twice before a wheel snapped. Total waste of money for something so poorly made and unsupported.

I bought this to drain some old USB power banks for recycling, and it does exactly that without drama. The constant-current mode holds steady, which is great for capacity testing with my multimeter and timer. The fan is a little louder than I expected, not a dealbreaker, but noticeable in a quiet room. Heat dissipation is otherwise solid, and the build feels sturdy for the price. A handy little tool for battery nerds.
Arrived fast in minimal packaging. Looked a little wrinkled but zippers feel solid and the size is perfect.
Would have been 5 stars but fabric is a tad thin and cannot be worn alone.. Needs to be layered or it is see through

I wear an 8-1/2 shoe so I ordered size 9 (U.S.) in these and they are narrow across the foot and in the calf area. I can barely get them on over thick socks or any type of pants leg. The heel is clear, and I don't like the look. I just bought them for out in the yard. They will do for that, but I would not wear them out in public.
My kid has tossed this around for weeks now and it still looks brand new. Holds up way better than I expected.

I really wanted these to work but my cat just sniffs them and walks away. I've tried crushing them into wet food and even hiding them in her favorite snacks but she always knows. Now I'm stuck with a full container she won't touch and no improvement with hairballs. Total waste of money for us unfortunately.
don't last long if you pull it along but otherwise it's ok

I've been using this mic for weekly band practices in my dusty garage for about four months now. It's survived a few accidental drops and still picks up every guitar lick and off-key vocal without any static. Really impressed with how solid it feels. No signs of wear, and the sound stays crisp even after all this abuse.
These work well although I find the wire to insulation ratio a bit disproportionate. Im glad they come in a 10 pack:)

Just wore it for the first time over the weekend - paddleboarding on a lake for about 2-3 hours. No sunburn, and even with temperatures in the 80s I was not overly warm with the long sleeves. No chafing or other discomfort, I had plenty of freedom of movement for paddling. The "deep sea" blue is a brighter blue than pictured, but I like it. The fit is tight to the skin, as it is supposed to be. I am 5'3", about 120lbs, 32D chest and the small fits me as I would like it to. Will probably get another in a different color!

This is the same story as Jag but from Roxy's POV. There is a lot that you learn about Roxy and why she is the way she is. It really awesome to see things from her POV which made for a more well rounded story. She really is a strong person and I really admire her. Jag and Roxy are definitely a unique couple. They started out basically hating each other (or close to it) and it basically boiled down to several chance meetings where they poked at each other. This was extremely amusing to read about. Jag has serious drug problems and unfortunately a huge part of that is is rock career and the people in it that put a lot of pressure on him. Not to mention his ex-girlfriend from before he became famous. Roxy grew up with a drug dealer father and brother who OD'd so she's seen that side of things and wants nothing to do with it. She turns out to be Jag's saving grace and the light at the end of the tunnel so to speak. Despite all their personal problems, they truly are a fantastic couple. I loved how raw and emotional the story line was. It felt like it could be one of those documentaries about a real life situation. I felt deeply invested with the characters and hoping for a good outcome. It's definitely not for those that like all the flowery words and a perfect story because it's far from that. But in it's own way it is perfect because of all they both had to endure. I absolutely loved this book and I can't wait to read about the other band members. 5 out of 5 stars!

The box showed up with a dented corner and the inner packaging felt flimsy, no foam, just thin cardboard. Headphones survived, but first impression was cheap. Clamp force is aggressive out of the box, and the pleather pads got warm fast. Sound is okay for the price, just wish the unboxing felt less budget.
so far 50 holes on one bit through 5 1/4" LVL's attached to SYP piles, about 12" of solid wood.
Solid replacement for my aging server setup. Plugged right in, no fuss, and has been spinning quietly for months without a single hiccup.

I tried several harnesses before settling on this one. It is hard to find a harness- type collar that fits and is comfy for a tiny dogs, but a harness is very necessary to protect little necks. This size small fits my 5-1/2-pound, 5-month-old pom.

I've had this grip wrap on my daily carry for about eight months now, and it still looks and feels like the day I put it on. I was honestly expecting it to start peeling or shifting after a few weeks of holster wear and sweat, but it hasn't budged at all. The texture gives me way more control during drills without chewing up my shirts or making reholstering awkward. Installation was simple with a little heat, and once it set, it really locked in. I've put a few hundred rounds downrange since adding it and my draw consistency has noticeably improved. Definitely holding up better than I expected.
This is a very challenging puzzle but I love it. It is beautiful and has kept us busy for a week.

It works out of the box. I was happy for a while until I pause the music and notice the massive static white noise this device is generating in the background. Then I disconnected the receiver from my speaker. My speaker is quiet again. I was hoping for better and returned it soon.

I got these for my daily dog walks and they've been a dream right out of the box. No breaking in needed and my feet feel supported even after miles. I'd tell anyone with a busy routine or foot fatigue to grab a pair.

I've lost count of how many lens caps I've misplaced, but this one finally stays put. Snaps on securely without any fuss and hasn't popped off once in my bag. For something so simple, it's oddly satisfying to use. Definitely saved me from more scratched glass.
Great product. Good material. Solidly made. As described. Even better price.
Neat game. It takes some thinking and trying to read what your opponent is trying to do.

As an outside sales rep, I do a lot of walking. By the end of the day, my feet are killing me. I'd never heard of these before. I guess I was buried under a rock or something. The shoes feel great. It's only been two weeks so I'll come back in months from now to do a complete review. They are snug and fit well. I could probably have gone a half size longer but am ok with the 11. They give a tremendous amount of support while feeling like walking in the most comfortable pair of sneakers. They look great with my Khakis which I where almost daily while working. They are very casual looking. I am pleasantly surprised.
I enjoy this author and I particularly like the light hearted Chrstmas stories. THey add to the happiness of Christmas and take one away from the bussel and hecticness of ones presnt duties.

I enjoyed parts of this one, but the pacing felt off compared to the rest of the series. Lauren's resistance dragged a bit for me, though I get why it was there. I'd suggest it to readers who like a slow-burn small-town romance with a stubborn lead. Not my favorite, but decent.

I've been telling all my baking friends about this, light enough to grab off the shelf but still powers through stiff dough. Perfect for smaller kitchens or anyone tired of hauling out a heavy stand mixer.

The actress was in her 20s playing a teenager. Fine. Maybe if I'd never seen her performance in the TV show "Lost", I wouldn't have cringed at her "performance" in this movie. She was fine in that role as a 20-something. Here, she WAY overdid the gawky excitable-apple-of-daddy's-eye. She's the reason I won't see the sequel. Glad everybody got paid...

My old RV detector finally gave up after six years, and I wasn't about to drop seventy bucks on the same model when this one kept popping up on the forums. For under twenty dollars, I figured it was worth a shot. It arrived with a Duracell already loaded, just yanked the tab and the green light started blinking. Took maybe four minutes to swap out, and the mounting plate lined up perfectly with the existing screw holes. Tested it with a butane lighter near the vent and it screamed within seconds, so sensitivity is on point. The compact profile actually tucks up tighter to the ceiling now. Honestly, at this price point, I'm tempted to grab a spare just to keep in the glovebox.

I grabbed a couple of these for the pendant lights over our kitchen island and the dimming performance really sold me. They ramp down smoothly to a soft, candle-like glow without any flicker or buzz, which makes dinner cleanup feel way less harsh. The clear glass and filament layout look spot-on vintage, but they sip power and stay cool to the touch even after hours.
I will never get back the time wasted on this ridiculous show.
My pup's breath definitely improved, but the smallest size was still a bit too large for her.

This coat is adorable! It looked great on my dog (although the hood was not functional). However, the sizing is not practical. The "sleeves" are too large (for any dog, I imagine) and the only measurements given are for the length. The girth (chest) measurement in absolutely essential for this coat to fit. I had to send the coat back, and order a smaller size. However, the smaller size didn't work either (the leg holes are the same size...too big). Alas, I had to go with a different brand.

If you watched wrestling you could see the change in the womens area happening over the 70's andbeyond. The women in this video were an important part of that change. Most were georgous and weren't just fill in performers. It was during that time that fitness was a booming industry and it was great to see in shape beautiful women who could perform almost to the level that the men did. It even got better.

I've had this cube set up for a few months now and it's easily my favorite tank. The 12x12 footprint fits perfectly on my desk without feeling cramped. Crystal clear glass and solid silicone work give it a clean, modern look. My little colony of blue dream shrimp and a handful of chili rasboras seem super happy in here. Highly recommend if you want a compact but roomy display.
These broke fairly easily and are a bit light. Better to purchase heavier dominoes for rallies. Great idea, just sort of cheap

My dog took to these pill pockets right away, and for the first week I thought I'd found the perfect solution. The chicken flavor smelled strong enough that she'd come running at meds time, which felt like a miracle. But after about two weeks of daily use, I noticed they started drying out faster in the bag, even with the seal pressed down carefully. Now I'm getting crumbly, cracked pockets that don't mold around pills well, so she just licks the treat off and spits the medicine onto the floor. For the price, I expected them to stay soft longer. They work okay if you use them up quickly, but the durability after opening is disappointing for multi-pill routines.
Arrived super fast in a simple recyclable bag, no damage. Opened it up and the material feels quality right away. Clips onto my gym bag perfectly. Stoked to finally ditch the messy loose chalk.

I went into this series with pretty low expectations, figuring it'd be another paint-by-numbers vampire tale, but it totally surprised me. The pacing is relentless in the best way, and the dynamic between the vampire lead and his human crew has more depth than I anticipated. The action scenes are genuinely thrilling, and the villains feel properly menacing rather than cartoonish. A few plot beats in book two felt a tad rushed, which is why I'm not going a full five stars, but overall this trilogy delivers way more entertainment value than I expected.

This router works very well, I have both Windows Vista and XP computers and an XP laptop and a printer all connected to it. The laptop is wireless connection. It was easy to install, but had trouble getting my settings correct. I called Linksys and they walked me through the settings. They were very patient and had me up and running in short time. Very fast speed and I am extremely satisfied. Highly reccomend this product.
The video held up after several replays, but the disc started skipping a bit after a couple months in our player.

This one took me a while to warm up to, not gonna lie, but once the younger generation started stirring up trouble I was all in. The main couple's relationship felt a little rushed compared to others in the series, though I still enjoyed their banter. I'd hand this to anyone who's already deep into the Dragon Kin world and loves seeing familiar faces cause chaos, newcomers should definitely start earlier in the series.

This was a wonderful follow up on the first book, "Tragic." I loved how the art work was described while being painted on her body. I enjoyed the surprises in this book as well. I really did not see some of it coming. I wonder what the next book will have in store? This is still very adult.:) Ready for the next one.

My previous watch was a Fitbit Charge 2. I really like the vivoactive HR but the indoor display brightness is much lower than the Fitbit. Outdoors the display is fine. Day 3 and the Garmin is still above 80% charge. I'm still getting used to all the features. I disabled all the activities except for walking. I like to go hiking in the hills and the Fitbit does not have GPS. I am a big guy 6'6" 280 lbs and the x-large band easily fits and is comfortable 24x7. Not sure why but the elevation on my first walk around town (maybe 50' above sea level) was registered as 520 feet. Maybe the GPS data is still downloading. I still keep my Fitbit on my right wrist. I would buy the watch again.

The sifting mechanism itself works pretty well and does a decent job separating waste, which is what I was most excited about. But the real issue for me is the size of the waste drawer, it's way smaller than I expected. With two cats, I'm having to empty it every other day, which kind of defeats the purpose of an automatic box. It also starts to smell quicker than I'd like, even with the little carbon filter they include. My cats adjusted fine and use it without problems, so no complaints there. I just wish the compartment was deeper so I could go longer between cleanings. For the price, I was hoping for something a little more low-maintenance.
These are way cuter in person and the woven detail is solid. Sizing runs just a hair long on me, but nothing a heel grip can't fix. For the price, they definitely feel more expensive than I expected.

I went in expecting at least a so-bad-it's-fun kind of vibe, but this was just a slog. The pacing is glacial, endless shots of guys wandering hallways in their boxers like they forgot what scene they're in. There's no suspense, no payoff, just a vague attempt at atmosphere that falls completely flat. I've seen community theater with tighter plots. The dialogue sounds like placeholder lines nobody bothered to rewrite. Honestly, I'd heard the director had a campy cult following, so I figured there'd be some charm buried in the mess. Nope. It's not even cheesy enough to laugh at. Just 80 minutes of empty padding that felt way longer.
I have two cats at home and they love it!

Don't waste your time with this one. With all the good books out there to be reading there is really no reason to waste your time with this mediocre outing. The main character is dull, the story is predictable, the plot is weak, and all in all a waste of time.
Our kids love these swings, sturdy and smooth. Only hiccup was missing clips for hanging, so grab those separately. Overall, a solid buy that keeps the backyard fun going.
These washcloths are super soft and the stitching held up perfectly after several washes. Great for sensitive skin.
Smelled bad, very bad the first few days. Rotting grass small. It had good support first few days. But then the support fizzled and the pillow turned into a pancake. Not worth the price.

You really can't go wrong for the price. I have two cats; the older one doesn't really pay attention to it except when I add more catnip. The younger one loves it and uses it all the time. She actually sits on it. Great value, I'll be buying another one soon.

I've watched this film about four times now, and it's held up surprisingly well on repeat viewings. The first time I saw it I was completely swept up in the visual style and the performances, but I didn't know if it would feel as impactful later. Honestly, it still lands. The emotional core doesn't wear thin, and I keep noticing new little details in the set design and costuming that I missed before. It's not a perfect movie, the pacing drags a bit in the last half hour every time I watch, but as a piece of cinema that I keep coming back to, it's been a solid addition to my collection. It's got staying power.
Loved this book.already recommended it to friends and family.first book I've read from this author and look forward to reading more.
Quality costume, excited for our daughter to wear this
These lenses have a sharp, crisp tint that cuts glare without making everything weirdly dark. I've worn them on long trail runs and my eyes feel way less tired afterward. Really solid clarity.
The battery held a charge fine for weekend shoots, but I wish the capacity was higher, it drains way faster than the original Nikon one.
Little thing runs well. I like it. It's quiet and pushes a good amount of water for its size. It also doesn't run very hot which is why I bought it.

Pratchett rarely misses, but this one genuinely surprised me with how sharp the humor lands. The tiny warriors bring such chaotic energy, it's even funnier than I'd hoped. Easily one of my favorite Discworld entries, perfect for a re-read when you need a laugh.
Arrived super fast and packed like a tank. First spin was buttery smooth and dead quiet right out of the box.

I purchased 2 of these and gave one as a birthday gift to my daughters friend and one to my daughter. It's suer cute bag and is a washable type of material. The disney princesses are true to their looks and have good detail. Its a barrel type of purse that has a zipper closure. My daughter loves it and puts lots of different things in it. Currently she is keeping her play medical items in it. She [lays with it quite a bit audit seems to be holding up. Obviously she hasn't had it for that long but it seems to be made well. Again i really like that it is a washable canvas type of material. So why did i only give 4 stars? I was a little bit surprised as to how small it was, but my toddler uses it and it fits her well BUT the zipper top itself has a small opening. Its just odd.
Cute tree, but perfect for a small apartment or dorm room.

The show itself gets 5 stars. I love it. The blu-ray gets less mainly because of the picture quality. Sometimes it was crystal clear and stellar. Sometimes it was muddy and full of artifacts. The special features are pretty thin too. Fans are mainly buying this one because of the show itself, but don't go into expecting awesome stuff, because you'll be disappointed.
If you have any questions at all about the teachings of the Catholic Church, this is the resource you need. We have owned multiple copies and keep giving them out to friends.
This thing is more of a desk toy for older fans who just display stuff. My kid got frustrated in minutes when the limbs popped off.

This thing was lame. It didn't even work when we got it. It's really light weight and feel like it's cheap. We ended up going to Best Buy to by a different one that would do the job right. The bad thing is we waited too long and when we wanted to send this thing back, it was already too late to get a refund.

Jumper is the type of movie that touches our most internal dreams. Who would not want to jump anywhere in the world back and forth?. The "bad guy" Samuel Jackson is terryfying and the actions scenss very imaginative. It did not get any OSCARS or prizes; it did not even did enought money for a sequel but the movie es PURE FUN which compared with you have in movies today is really a lot.

I bought this for a storage unit after someone tried cutting my old lock. This thing is absurdly beefy, the shackle alone makes standard padlocks look like toys. Super smooth key action, zero sticking even after weeks of rain and dust. Feels like it could stop a truck. Totally worth the price for actual peace of mind.

This is a very good book for people interested in Russian culture and history. The early part of the 20th century is seen through the eyes of a Russian nobleman who has become a "non-person" under the communist regime and he consigned to a tiny space in the attic of the grand Metropole Hotel in Russia, under house arrest. How he overcomes his circumstances is the substance of the story.
I have had a handful of kneepads over the years and these are well made
The heavy duty battery makes my hand held radio run longer with more options enabled.
Super easy to install...needed it because I was upgrading my graphics card. Works like a charm so far.
This is a nice story with engaging characters and plot. Like Hallmark movies, you know how the story will end,but there are enough twists to be entertaining.
The articulation is surprisingly smooth, makes posing him on my desk super fun.

I grabbed this expecting a tight, interview-focused read, but the structure threw me off. The opening stretches on way longer than I thought it would before the actual interview starts, and the pacing in those early pages felt sluggish. Once the conversation finally kicks in, the content is decent, some thoughtful exchanges, but it didn't fully make up for the slow setup. I was hoping for something more immediate and engaging, especially given the intriguing premise. It's not a bad book, just uneven, and I found myself skimming more than I wanted to. Three stars because it delivers in parts, but the overall execution left me a little underwhelmed compared to what I had in mind.

I wasn't sure I'd actually use all the timer modes, but this thing has become part of my daily routine. I use the countdown for baking, the long-term target timer for tracking project deadlines, and the stopwatch during workouts. The screen is clear and the buttons feel solid. Honestly, it's just a satisfying little tool that keeps me surprisingly organized.

The start of the movie was--well--predictable. The rest of it was poorly-conceived, at times inconceivable, poorly-directed, and mostly unbelievable: especially the ending, which was completely unnecessary. I hope this was one of Caviezel' s earliest: his subsequent portrayal of Jesus was superbly acted, directed and memorable-- plus his more recent movies and television.

Ill admit some of the changes in the special edition weren't great namely greedo firing first and the new songs in return of the jedi. but this dvd only serves to make the films look a little better and have better continuity. Greedo fires first looks a lot better and the timing is more like they fire at the same time. Jabba and the speeder looks way bettter in a new hope this time. the emperor and boba fett are played by who they should be played by in empire strikes back. and anakin appears as he appeared before he ceased to exist. how could anakin have grown older. as obi wan says anakin ceased to exist when he became vader. ill admit it would be nice to have the originals as a bonus feature like on the alien quadrilogy discs, or at least have a comparison feature so you can see the original scenes that were changed like on Star Trek the motion picture, but the fact is the dvd makes all good changes, so stop whining about it.

I've been using one band from the pack for about three months of daily wear, including sweaty workouts and showers, and it's held up surprisingly well. No fraying or stretching so far. The material stays comfortable all day and doesn't irritate my skin. Only minor gripe is the clasp loosens slightly over time, but it's easy to snap back. Solid value overall.
Arrived super fast, packed with care, and my kid's eyes lit up instantly.
It arrived not very sharp, and the tip was rounded on the bottom. That is unacceptable, but I was able to flatten it out and get it sharp and it works fine now.

I have foot problems, so it is hard to find shoes that I can wear all day. After being on a treadmill for an hour, I put these on for the rest of the day and went shopping, and was on my feet all day with the Grandkids, my feet never bothered me. This is what I was expecting since I wear a different style of Haflinger as a house shoe and have never had problems. I wear Chaco in the summer, but start to have problems when winter comes and I have to start wearing real shoes. I have spent a lot of money on good brands and still have problems, so I am delighted that Haflinger has shoes I can wear outside the house. I am a little worried about getting them wet, but I guess I'll deal with that when the time comes. I will probably be buying another pair for outdoors again soon. Best shoe I have found for all around comfort and support!

I got this for my niece's 3rd birthday after she wouldn't stop talking about her friend's dollhouse. Honestly, I was nervous it would be flimsy or a nightmare to put together, but it was way sturdier than expected. The amount of furniture and little accessories included is kind of ridiculous in the best way, kitchen stuff, a toilet, tiny lamps, even a birdcage. She hasn't stopped playing with it for weeks. I love that the whole thing closes up neatly with everything inside, so her mom doesn't lose her mind stepping on tiny forks. Definitely outshines pricier options I almost bought.
These fit smaller than I was expecting. They are similar to a Gap tank top I have that I love, but tighter so they look a bit scandalous. Good for sleeping.
Got this little compressor set up over the weekend and honestly it runs quieter than I expected. Fills fast, holds pressure solid, and the footprint is just right for my small shop corner.
It was very different, so many good twists and turns. I really enjoyed this book, Ms. Byrd does it again!
For the price, this goofy flick delivers solid entertainment. It's cheap fun that doesn't pretend to be anything else, and I've already rewatched it twice.

I snagged this for work travel and honestly, for the price it's a steal. I have a 17-inch Dell and it slides in snugly once I took out the bottom foam insert, still feels cushioned enough that I don't worry about bumps. The shoulder strap is surprisingly comfy, even when I load it up with chargers, a mouse, and a notebook. Zippers feel solid, material seems durable. If you need a no-frills bag that fits a larger laptop without spending a ton, this does the job.
The material is super soft and cozy, but the drawstring on the shorts is way too long and flimsy. Otherwise, they're great for lounging around the house.
Had this unit for six months now, still kicks hard every time. Solid build, no glitches at all, and the bass is just ridiculous.

Good fit. Straps in back were not sewn properly. I had to reinforce the stitching before I attempted to wear this dress. I like the casual style. It's flattering to my arms, since I'm older I need the coverage at the exact spot where the sleeves begin. Length is perfect for me at 5'1", it hits me just barely above knee level. Can be dressed up or used as casual wear. I'm hoping the wrinkles will steam out, not having much luck using a de-wrinkle spray. I would consider this dress a decent purchase and would recommend to a friend.
Bought this for quick file transfers between work machines. It's seriously snappy and the metal casing feels premium. Totally dependable little drive.

I've re-read this one three times now and it still holds up, the pacing never drags, the banter lands just as sharp, and the character arcs stay satisfying. After months of coming back to it, I keep noticing fresh little details I missed before. This series has serious staying power on my Kindle.

I just love this bracelet. It came in a nice blue box, like others have said, the stickers do not remove easily for re-use, but you could always put your own sticker over it if you wanted to re-use the box. Inside the box was a black suede drawstring pouch sitting atop the foamy padding in generally find in jewelry packing. As for the bracelet itself, it's beautiful. My 18 yr daughter loves it, so I imagine I'll be sharing. It feels rather luxurious to be wearing all of these pearls, which are intertwined with a dark brown string and crystals. The crystals have a great sparkle to them which adds an element of bling to the pearls. The pearls are large in size, and definitely potato shaped. The pearls do have markings on them which do appear to be from tools, many of the pearls are unmarked though and I don't feel like it distracts from the beauty. As for the brown cord, it clearly shows the brown cord in the photos, so it's to be expected and I don't mind it one bit. The size of the bracelet is a bit on the small size. I am smaller boned and don't have tiny wrists, but they are probably smaller than average and I feel most comfortable using the extender when clasping the bracelet together. All in all, this is a bracelet that I will wear a lot. With the coloring you can easily wear it with jeans just as well as with a more glamorous outfit for a night out.

Just bought a couple more as back ups. I really like this remote and it works well for what I need it for. I emailed Audiovox and they confirmed that this is the exact same remote as the RCR314WR but this one costs less.
Terrible. Ugly, hard to work with and wY too long.
Cute but the material feels cheap for what they charge, honestly not worth it.
These socks hold up wash after wash without losing shape or softness. For the price, it's a steal, my feet stay comfy all day, and the subtle color coding makes laundry a breeze.
For under ten bucks, this story gutted me in the best way. The emotional depth here rivals books triple the price.

This book was a total surprise find and I couldn't put it down. The medical details felt authentic without getting too technical, and the mystery kept me guessing. I'd hand this to anyone who loves smart detective stories with believable characters, especially fans of Kathy Reichs or Tess Gerritsen looking for a fresh voice.
excellent reading and story. Could not put the book down.

I've had this Intermatic EI600 installed on our front porch for over three years now, and it's held up perfectly through rain, snow, and some pretty brutal summer heat. The housing still looks clean with no yellowing or cracks. My favorite thing is how it subtly adjusts dusk-to-dawn timing as the seasons change, come December, the lights kick on earlier without me touching a thing. We've got an older two-wire setup too, and honestly, the battery hasn't needed swapping yet. Programming took maybe ten minutes, and I haven't had to mess with it since. No flickering, no random resets, just steady, predictable performance. Really solid piece of gear for the price.
It's not bad but that is not strong so after using several times it's frustrated. And i don't know the use of the white bar. There's also no tips. Delivery is not bad
I wasn't expecting these to hold up so well for heavy-duty tasks, but they completely surprised me, no tearing after a full day's work.

My order arrived two full days earlier than the tracking originally showed, which was a great surprise. It came in a simple sealed bag, nothing fancy but everything was clean and folded neatly. Slipped it on right away and it felt snug without pinching anywhere. The material seems breathable and the seams lie flat, so there's no digging. I've only worn it around the house so far, but it stays put and doesn't roll down. First impressions are really solid, and I'm excited to see how it holds up under different outfits.
Another great one, I am loving this whole series, they can be read separately but best enjoyed if you read them in order
One of many excellent squeeze balls available. Put it in a bowl with a remote next to your favorite TV chair and work those hands!
The dual-clip design is a game-changer for our puller, no more tangled leashes!

Overall does what a hub should do. Works 100% with powered devices like printers and scanners. But it doesn't like iPods: the connection will be lost (not a good idea to disconnect an iPod without "ejecting" it), or no connection will be made at all, or the port on the computer where the hub is connected will lock up. Also, the build quality is poor. The silver finish is uneven, even worn off (out of the box) in a few spots. And the clear cover over the LED indicators is falling off. Perhaps Belkin's new "Plus" hubs are better, but I'm not willing to find out. Belkin USB 2.0 Plus Hub (7 Port) F5U307-BRN

I grabbed a couple of these oversized bricks mostly for taming the sea of loose Bionicle and Technic bits, but the real surprise was how solid the lids lock. They've survived multiple drops off a shelf without popping open and scattering parts everywhere, which honestly impressed me more than I expected.

One of the best knives I've ever owned. Stupid sharp out of the box, and love the fact that it not only came with thigh rigging, but also an emergency belt extraction tool. Both are on my go bag, strapped in my front seat!
These blanks worked perfectly for my backup project. Not a single coaster, and they read faster than the old brand I used to buy.

Sizer die started scaring brass after about thirty rounds. Junk. Should have purchased RCBS or Redding dies. Contacted Lee and they wanted me to ship the die back and would not pay shipping. They said they would give me credit on my next purchase. Why would I want to purchase more junk?

I grabbed this on a whim when it was on sale, and honestly, I got way more than my money's worth. The pacing keeps you hooked without cheap tricks. It sidesteps all the usual cliches you'd expect from the setup and builds toward something genuinely surprising. Solid world-building that never drags. Easily a steal for the price, can't wait to see what comes next.
Good read. Already reading the second book.

Just got this hub for my MacBook Air setup and the USB-C data transfer speed is surprisingly snappy. I can finally offload photos from my camera's SD card while charging my tablet through the same unit without any lag. Slim design tucks neatly under my monitor stand too. No more port juggling, super solid little workhorse.

I really wanted to like these. They felt snug and supportive the first couple weeks, but after about a month of regular wear the elastic at the top started giving out. Now the band rolls down constantly, which completely defeats the purpose of a stay-up design. I also noticed the fabric near the inner thigh is already thinning and looks like it's about to tear. For the price, I expected way better durability. I followed the washing instructions exactly and didn't abuse them, so it's not a care issue. They're comfortable at first, but they just don't hold up. Pretty disappointed.
Embroidery is stiff but doesn't bother me. Cute for the price
Still solid after months, no rust or wobble. Looks clean, works great.
These have a nice weight without being clunky, and the narrow base keeps them from tipping over on my uneven patio table.

I grabbed this to use as my daily work bag and I'm honestly surprised by how much it holds without looking bulky. The zipper glides smoothly and feels solid, which was a big selling point for me since I'm always yanking it open one-handed. The fabric has a nice lightweight feel but still seems durable after a couple months of rough use. I especially love how the interior stays organized even when it's stuffed full. It's become my go-to for commuting and quick errands.

Daughter, 10, loved it. She is a horse fan and my wife grew up with Breyer horses so we picked some Breyer stuff up as gifts. This was a big hit, especially the ones that came with accessories like barrels, fences, saddles, etc. Would recommend for the kids that like playing with and learning about horse varieties.
Bought this thinking it'd be perfect for my nephew, but it broke within an hour, only recommend if you hate kids.
My kid's been flying it nonstop for weeks and we're having an absolute blast together.
Honestly, it's even cuter in person and way sturdier than I expected for the price. My kid hasn't put it down.
I really liked the product. fully met expectations. Many thanks to you guys! A really good product! Recommend to everyone!!

I went in expecting a solid heist flick but this one barely held my attention. The pacing drags in the middle and the so-called twists don't really land with much impact. Acting is competent enough and the production feels decent for what it is, but the story just never grabbed me. Not terrible, not memorable, strictly middle of the road. I doubt I'll ever feel the urge to rewatch it. Fine for a lazy afternoon but don't expect to be blown away.

Janet Evanovich continues to produce a fun and lively tale of the mishaps of Stephanie Plum. One would think that by the 14th installment, the story lines would get a little stale, but there are no disappointments with this rolicking tale. Evanovich continues to wrest laughter from the reader in spite of themselves as she takes our heroine from one implausible situation to another. Quite frankly, it is the side characters that continue to keep this series fresh and appealing. Fun and easy read. You won't regret the time spent.

I wanted to love the cooling cover, which actually does feel nice against the skin at first. Unfortunately, the fill is so loosely packed that it flattens within an hour and offers zero support. I keep waking up with a stiff neck and have to fluff it constantly just to get any shape back.
For the price, it's OK. Can't complain about anything this cheap... If the price was different, wouldn't buy and wouldn't recommend.

I've been using these little molds for a couple weeks now and honestly, for the price, it's kind of a steal. You get a bunch in the pack so we always have a clean one ready. My youngest is super picky but ever since I started making star-shaped pancakes and dinosaur eggs, breakfast has been way less of a battle. They're simple to use, just drop them in the pan and pour. Cleanup is quick too, just rinse or toss in the dishwasher. The silicone hasn't warped or stained at all, which I was half expecting given how cheap they were. Definitely feels like I got more than my money's worth here.

This book presented a business parable which provided a nice framing device for the principles on how to be a Go-giver instead of a Go-Getter. The story is a vehicle to share the Authors 5 Laws of Stratospheric Success which involve expressing gratitude, and being generous to others. The lessons were a good reminder that getting ahead in business (or anything else worthwhile) does not have to come at the expense of others and the value of networking. If did feel that the narrative got a little to wrapped up in how clever the author felt the mysteries of identities of the The Connector and the Friday Guest were. The author also used the lesson of appearances can be deceiving to justify several contrived relationships between characters, which made the ending feel somewhat forced. A very feel good story with a good theme but the narrative itself suffered.

I wanted to love this top but it just didn't hit the mark. Based on the photos, I expected a sleeker, more tailored fit, but it runs noticeably loose through the midsection. The fabric is softer than anticipated, which is nice, but it also clings in odd places. My main gripe is how the nursing access works, it's not as discreet as advertised. The overlap gapes slightly and the inner layer bunches up, creating a visible bump under the outer fabric. It definitely screams "nursing top" rather than blending in as a regular shirt. For the price, I hoped for something I'd feel cute and confident in, but this just feels a bit frumpy and awkward on my frame.
The old-school animation and catchy songs are way better than today's flashy CGI. My niece watches it on repeat!

I went in bracing for a letdown since the comic is so iconic, but this completely won me over. The animation was way slicker than I expected and the fight scenes hit hard. Voice cast nailed it, especially Superman's quieter moments. It's not a panel-for-panel remake but honestly that worked in its favor. Totally worth the rental.
my 10 year old siberian husky loved this toy. the hat didn't last long but the toy did

I've had this paperback kicking around my kitchen and stuffed in my bag for a couple months now, and it's held up surprisingly well, spine still tight, no loose pages despite plenty of flipping back to reread sections. Ruhlman covers a lot of ground here, and while it meanders a bit, the insights into how chef culture has shifted really stick with you. Solid, durable read for anyone curious about the industry.
Great but I wish the pads were rubbery. The slip off of items that aren't parallel

I chose this alarm because I had owned or used one that looked similar for years--- they were easy to set and were very reliable. I was surprised to find the new model is quartz and has a very pleasing blue illumination. It also has a snooze feature that the old one did not have---Ilive in an area that has several power outages a year, and when the power goes off I can look at the clock and can tell exactly when the power went off and can pass that information on to the power company. I am eighty years old and have owned several clocks that I found impossible to operate,and this model is perfect for my needs. If I need it I USE my cellphone as a backup----A great product-----
Not bad for the money, but not nearly as bright as claimed.
Really pleased with this purchase. Soft underfoot, looks way pricier than it was, and ties the whole room together nicely. Exactly what we needed.

I went in with sky-high expectations after all the buzz, and somehow this still blew them out of the water. The emotional depth snuck up on me, one minute I'm laughing at the banter, the next I'm tearing up over a twist I didn't see coming. The pacing is flawless, and the characters feel like people I actually know. Easily my favorite read this year.
Works well, so far, and is quite pretty. Nice, subtle, deep burgundy purple band, very easy to read face. Elegant.
Top-notch for stainless TIG, my go-to setup now, any hobby welder should grab one.
Exceeded my hopes, solid build, works flawlessly.
If you can set this trap, it will kill the critter dead.
Great little tool for weekend DIY jobs. My brother-in-law saw mine and immediately ordered one too. Solid build for the cost.

I honestly wasn't sure what to expect beyond a simple photo collection, but this book blew me away. It goes so much deeper than just pretty pictures (though those are stunning). The sections on Edwardian social rules, the servant hierarchy, and even the fabrics used in costumes gave me a whole new appreciation for the show. I've rewatched the series with the book beside me, and it's like having a personal historian fill in all the gaps. It's hefty, beautifully bound, and feels like a true keepsake rather than a quick tie-in. If you love the Crawleys, you'll treasure this.

I've gone through a few of these now, and the spine is still holding up great even after tossing it in my bag daily. The pages haven't yellowed or loosened, which is rare for a paperback I've read twice. Solid little book.

Got this board for my 7-year-old to mess around with at the shore break, and honestly the slick bottom skin is what sold me. It glides over shallow sandbars without getting chewed up, which is a huge plus when kids are dragging it everywhere. Super lightweight so my son can carry it himself, and the bright color makes it easy to spot in the water. Held up great after a full week of daily use, no delamination or cracks. Solid little board for the price.
My kid's dropped this thing so many times on concrete and it barely has a scratch after months of daily use.
Got this for my nephew and honestly surprised how sturdy it is for the cost.

For the price, this thing's a steal. I wasn't expecting much since it's pretty affordable, but it fits snug and adds a solid layer of peace of mind. Already took a clumsy stumble on a gravel path and the tank came out spotless while the cover just has a minor scuff. Material feels durable and the zipper glides smoothly. It's not bulky, which I appreciate. Honestly, spending a few bucks to avoid a costly tank replacement is a no-brainer. Really impressed with the bang for your buck here.

These work amazing under my recliner. I placed 2 at the front and 2 at the back under the recliner and so far so good. I haven't had to reposition the recliner because it is hitting the wall. My recliner sits on carpet. Problem solved! Happy customer!

I received these yesterday and use them for wall washers for the front of my house, 2 covered the front of the house great. Memory worked fine, came with detail instructions. These have a 2 year warranty and I can't comment on that yet but, I will later. Don't buy the ones without memory unless you want to have the same lighting effect all the time, or go out each night and change them, to what you want. These remotes do not have long range, you have to get real close to the light for them to work, like 1 foot. I have mine plugged into a Woods 13547 6-Outlet Power Stake w/ Light Sensor & 6-Foot Cord, it also has a remote that will turn them on or off from inside the house, or you can set it to stay on 2-4-6-or 8 hours. Best RBG lights I have tried, only time will tell on the life of these. The only reason I didn't give it 5 stars is because of the unknown durability.

We got a new swing set and needed a few swings for it. I had a baby bucket seat but my 2yo wanted her own big girl seat. I picked up another seat a few days before this one so will be comparing the two. The other one was $7 more so will take that into consideration. This seat says that it will hold up to 250lbs and so does the other one. One thing that this one says on the bag is that it is meant for 3-10 yo. Also it is just a plain green swing and the other one has information on the backside. The other one has more plastic underneath so it looks heavier and stronger. The chains are both the same length and commercial grade and covered with a yellow plastic coating for comfort and safely. Overall I am very satisfied with this swing. It is perfect for our play set and the girls love it. I think that the other swing is slightly better than this one but just by a hair. I got this Heavy Duty swing seat at a discount for my testing, evaluation & honest, unbiased review. The fact that I got them at a discount has not influenced or impacted my judgment of this product. I am in no way required by the seller to leave positive remarks about their product.

I bought this case a while ago for my Macbook. I loved it. It was durable and protected my Mac. The stand was also a plus on flat surfaces. Unfortunately, with age it broke. Also if you don't clean it often crud will pile up and it's noticeable because this product is see through.

This was my third novel by author Lorraine Carey. I was expecting that same Classic Style of adventure, but in Out of the Ashes I found Carey had exhibited her ability to add a twist on that old Classic style using rich Native American legends with the paranormal. Dean Banks is a teen who lives out west and is not your normal teen. He inherits the ability to have superhuman powers from an ancient Apache shaman as he alone must destroy it before it destroys a centuries old gold mine. I loved how his bravery and strong sense of spirituality were brought out in this novel. There is a touch of soft romance here that will warm your heart.. I think this is bound to be the best seller for young adults. If your child loves to read the DEAN BANKS ADVENTURES are a must read. If your kid doesn't like to read Lorraine Carey has a gift for making stories come alive. This may just be the answer to get your child to fall in love with the written word..

I wanted to like this KVM switch, but it's a mixed bag. Setup was easy enough, but I immediately ran into cable length issues, the included VGA and USB cables barely reached my tower, which sits under the desk. Ended up having to buy extensions, which felt like an extra hidden cost. Also, it absolutely needs the driver installed to function right; without it, my keyboard and mouse were spotty. Once everything was sorted, switching between my desktop and laptop was smooth, and video quality was fine for basic tasks. It works, just not out of the box in a typical setup. Decent for the price if you're prepared to troubleshoot and buy extra cables.
Great price and great tool. Always hard to find in the store.

Excellent box collection of poems!!!! If you love fantasy, then you'll love these fairytale adventures!!!! Come enter these amazing worlds filled with unique creatures as they slowly draw you into a place of magic. The poems talk about potions, witches, wizards and otherworldly beings.
It's definitely a cute watch and I love the color a lot. However, it is too loud!!!!!! I could hear it when I wear it to sleep.

These are terrible for scooping icecream. I think its because the slider piece is not close enough to the scoop... the icecream gets stuck & the scoop gets stuck out, so you must have super human strength to squeeze open or close the handle & even then, the icecream doesn't come out. I have tried soaking in hot water & it just makes a mess of melted icecream. These Look like the real thing (there are some that look like these that are much better quality!) I used the smaller one for cookie dough & that one actually works quite well. Maybe I got a dud on the big one.
I'd tell anyone with a skinny senior cat to grab this. Our 14-year-old rescue filled out noticeably after a couple weeks, and her coat's shinier too.
Read instructions, test, and forget it. I have these units AND the fire / C M combo detectors both. This stuff is deadly odorless and silent. Do not let you home be without IF you have gas heat.
I expected a fun dance session, but this completely kicked my energy into high gear. Shaun T makes every move easy to follow, and I'm genuinely sore the next day.
Arrived a day early in perfect condition, nicely folded with no wrinkles. Tried it on immediately and wow, the fabric drapes beautifully and feels so soft. Instantly felt confident and gorgeous.

I grabbed this when it was free, which was the main selling point for me. For zero dollars, it's a decent way to kill an afternoon if you like Tarzan-inspired romance. The jungle setting and the dynamic between the leads have some nice tension, and there are a couple scenes I genuinely enjoyed. But it ends right when things start picking up, which left me feeling a little cheated even though I didn't pay anything. I get it's a serial, but the cutoff felt abrupt rather than a natural pause. If you go in knowing you'll need to buy the next part to get any resolution, the price is right for a sample-length read. Just don't expect a full arc.
TI chipset, works great for audio over FireWire (I tried it with 32 channels at 48kHz/24bit).

Bruce Willis did his best work here and the rest of the cast was excellent as well. As good as this film is, it's unfortunate that all M. Night's subsequent work was unfavorably compared to it. I can recommend "Unbreakable"(also starring Willis) as the same kind of mystery with a "drop jaw" ending.
This was a cute book. Fun to read. Gave you a good idea about these ladies and how close they were to each other.

I've been using the Level U for close to four months now, mostly during workouts and long walks. The plastic band has held up better than I expected, no cracks or loosening at the joints, and it still sits comfortably around my collar without shifting. I've accidentally snagged the cable a few times and it didn't fray. Sound is clean and full for the price, though I wish the earbud shape was a bit more forgiving after an hour or so. Battery still gives me a solid day of mixed use. Connection to my Samsung phone is mostly stable, with only an occasional quick dropout that fixes itself. Solid daily driver.
Came quickly and just in time for the event. Medium fit my 10 year old daughter perfectly and they are soft and hold up well in the wash.

After trying three other harnesses, this is the one that finally works for my wiggly pit mix. The belly buckle sits low enough that it never digs into his sensitive skin, and the padded chest strap doesn't twist when he pulls. I'd absolutely recommend it to anyone with a barrel-chested escape artist or a dog who gets chafed easily. The fit guide with actual photos was a game-changer for getting it adjusted right the first time.

I was really impressed with how quickly this arrived, ordered it late Thursday and it was on my doorstep Saturday morning in perfect condition. The packaging was simple but sturdy, no bent corners or scuffed cover, which I always appreciate with a paperback. Right out of the box, the book feels nice in your hands, with a clean layout and a cover that's actually motivating to look at. Flipping through, the chapters are broken up in a way that doesn't feel overwhelming, and the tone is super approachable, like getting advice from a knowledgeable friend rather than a lecture. I haven't finished it yet, but my first impression is that this is exactly the kind of straightforward, no-gimmicks guide I've been looking for to kickstart some healthier habits.

Package arrived in perfect shape, double-boxed with foam inserts, no dings at all. Took it straight out and plugged in six M18 batteries; the sequential charging kicked on immediately. Super quiet, compact footprint on my bench, and feels rock-solid. First impression is this thing is a total game-changer for my workflow.
For what I paid, I expected straps I could actually tighten, but they're just fixed length.

I am a breeder of Shihtzu and got these for my girls. I wasn't overly fond of the quality. They didn't really fit well. They were baggy in the legs and they kept slipping out of them. Plus the sizes weren't really accurate. I got one for my 7 lb girl and it swam on her and my 12 lb girl could fit in it but kept slipping off so was even kind of baggy on her. I would not buy again.

I've had this book on my shelf for about a year now, flipping through it regularly, and it's held up beautifully, no loose pages or worn cover despite all the handling. What I love most is how it gives you a rare, ground-level view of how a company can scale from zero to a global giant, told by people who were deep in the internal culture rather than the usual founder narrative. After multiple reads, the insights on team-building and inclusive growth still feel fresh and practical. It's become one of those books I grab when I need a reality check on what actually makes an organization durable, not just flashy. Solid binding, too, survived a coffee spill without warping.

this light has been installed for a few days now, so far so good. superrrr bright. like ridiculously bright. light reaches out a good 40-50' EASY. motion sensor picks me up from about 20 ft away, and im a tiny guy, creeping slowly like a stalker. neighbors are probably like wtf? only reason i didn't give it 5 stars was bc the housing for the light itself is a little tricky/ "poorly" dedigned. i ended up having to take it all apart to get the main mount screwed down, the put reattach the light to the holding arm. basically, with this unit once it is installed per instruction you can either have a semi loose horizontal swinging motion, or a semi loose vertical motion. bc i took mine apart and reassembled, its tighter than a pair of kardashian pants. if you know anything about hardware/ afroengineering, this is a great product for you

This book started out slow in the beginning but steadily picked up the pace and by the end was an intense. It hits you with the shot you aren't expecting and makes you wish it was a bit longer....Cant wait for to read more of his books. Good for fans of what would you do if it happend to you.

I ended up ordering my usual size despite the sizing warnings, and they fit perfectly. The satin looks elegant and the padding is comfortable for long wear. I knocked off a star only because the elastic strap felt a little tight at first.
My vet recommended this for my rescue mutt's constant scratching and it cleared up his skin fast. Perfect for any dog with anxiety-triggered skin problems.
After a few weeks, the buttons started sticking a bit.
This book was such a fun ride for the price. Twists, heart, and a great mystery I devoured in one sitting.

I've had this Coast pen light clipped to my work vest for about four months now, and it's held up way better than I expected. I'm in and out of crawlspaces and attics daily, and it gets knocked against ductwork, dropped on concrete, covered in dust, still fires up every time without flickering. The metal body has some scuffs, but nothing's loose or dented. I even ran it through a heavy rainstorm while checking a roof leak and it didn't skip a beat. Battery life is solid, and the tail switch still feels crisp, not mushy like some others I've burned through. Honestly, for the price, I'm surprised it's taken this much abuse and just keeps working. Definitely a reliable little workhorse.
Great Stylus pack, and works great with my iPad. They come with extra tips which is very nice!
For the price, this pan is a steal. Fits perfectly and my little guy hasn't managed to destroy it yet.
I'd only recommend this to someone I wanted to prank with a painfully dull snoozefest that has zero believable moments.

I've put this sander through three big deck projects now and it hasn't skipped a beat. The build quality really shows after heavy use, no wobble, no loss of power. Still runs smooth and eats through rough spots like day one.
Love owls and I love this scarf. Its adorable and is a good price.
Easy to slip on, even with one hand and covers my glasses perfectly, thanks!

This newest offering in the Men in Blue series is my favorite so far, Although Ben, Ryan and Shari have pasts filled with unimaginable horrors and have suffered significant losses, they continue to survive and thrive. That's not to say this book is filled with happy, shiny people. They story is populated with characters who support and stand with each other no matter what happens. It's great to see "old" friends from previous MIB books and the introduction of 2 new characters gives me hope that more stories are to follow. The suspense blends well with the lighter moments like the "unicorn salute" and the sex scenes are typical Jayne Rylon quality...smokin' hot. I received an ARC in return for an honest review.
Bought this for my 0months old Gladiator halloween costume. Very adorable, the nose is kind of wonk, but it was probably just smushed from manufacturers.

These are SO comfortable. Like walking on a marshmallow with butter between your toes! But not quite that messy or gross. Just trust me, they are so soft and easy to wear with just about anything. I bought these in black and grey (which is actually white) and love them both!

Box arrived in great shape with no dents, and the packaging kept everything snug. Unboxing was quick and the pieces looked vibrant right away. My kid dove straight in, so it definitely makes a solid first impression, just wish the joints held up a bit better.

I love good coffee and do not mind spending a little money to research different coffee making products. This does indeed brew some good coffee. Importantly, this device will keep that coffee fresh tasting for the two hours that I have it on the 'warm' setting. It is easy to fill and set up. It took me a few minutes to figure this thing out. I was used to the carafe brewers. Pros: -On the 'bold' setting, it makes a good tasting brew. It keeps the coffee good tasting on the 'keep warm' function. -Easy fill, no spill. For filling the container or filling a cup. Cons: -If you fill the internal water container over the 'marked' 12 cup line, the water will leak out a hole in the back. The next morning you may wonder why there is some water under the coffee maker. I did this a few times before I figured it out. Duh-ho! It looks like there is a lot more room in the container for the extra water, not so, too much water will drip out the back (unseen). -The bottom of the container is hard to clean, 8 plastic screw anchors, for the 'keep warm' plate, are on the bottom of the container. I like to use a soapy sponge to clean after use, the little things sticking out of the bottom make that harder than it should be. Overall: This is a good buy. I would not recommend it to a friend, unless, I first explained 'cleaning thing' mentioned above. If you love good tasting coffee, hey, buy it.

I'll be honest, I wasn't expecting much from a basic cleaner, but this blew me away. It cuts through carbon faster than anything I've tried and rinses clean without weird smells or sticky leftovers. My bore brushes glide through now. For the price, it honestly outperforms cleaners that cost twice as much.

I grabbed this hoping for a fun retro watch, but for the cost it's a letdown. The transfer looks rough, and the bonus features are basically nonexistent. I get that it's old, but at this price I expected at least a decent restoration or some extras. Feels like a budget release with a premium tag. Hard to recommend unless you're a die-hard collector.

Finally Declan and Harper get their story!! I enjoyed going back to Hell to see Declan get his fiesty independent woman. Watching single mom Harper give in and give her heart a chance was something I could totally relate to. It wasn't easy for these two to come together but nothing is in the tiny town of Hell but you will totally root for them. And it was nice to get updates on the friends who are family to Declan and Harper. A hot read I definitely recommend. A little slow to get going but an enjoyable stand alone read.
I've used this on every weekend hike for months now and it still performs flawlessly, solid feel, no wear, and exactly what I needed at a great value.

*** Playmobil 5483 Dragons comprises 7 pieces and not 15, as stated on the box, unless the articulated legs, wings, head, and also claws, helmet and gauntlets are counted separately, but they are parts, not pieces, and counting them as pieces could be misleading. Maybe their German origin can be blamed. It is an elaborate, but passive, molded plastic toy, like "free" toys included with some kid's meals by big chains, but much bigger. The excitement may not be proportional to the toy's size. Thus, it seems quite expensive especially in comparison to more functional, similarly sized, and slightly cheaper Mega Bloks Assassin's Creed or Call of Duty Mob of the Dead block set. It is doubtful that children of age 5+ are capable to appreciate its masterful quality resulting in the relatively high price. Children ages 10-12 have many more options than pushing passive toys. Thus, the upper range of the 5-12 years age bracket of children the toy is intended to seems exaggerated. However, it is well made, durable, easy to wipe and clean, and should by attractive to children ages 5-9, if they convince the parents to spend, and - of course - to hobbyists of age up to 100.

First, I find the main character, Lucas Davenport, one of the most compelling characters of this genre. He is the type of guy I would like to be, or at least know, if I were transported to a fictional universe. He is not quite in the league, interest-wise, as a Harry Bosch, but likable and edgy just the same. I'm somewhat surprised that he hasn't made his way on the big or little screen. This being said, however, this book was a disappointed as it degenerates into a story that might play if Lifetime, Spike and the SciFi channel merge. Sandford has written much better in the past and I'm hoping his story lines have not run dry. It's a decent beach or summer read but take it for what it is. A reasonable entertaining work that will kill a few hours but be forgotten in just about the same amount of time.

I really wanted these to work for trail runs. The tread pattern grips like crazy on loose dirt, which I loved. But after just two miles, the arch support started digging into my left foot in a weird way. Had to cut my run short. For the price, I expected way better comfort. Pretty disappointed.

Had this thing for maybe three weeks and the stitching around the handle is already coming apart. Used it lightly for home workouts, nothing crazy. Really wanted to like it but the build just isn't holding up at all.

I got this for my 7-pound chihuahua who's pretty chill, so I didn't need anything heavy-duty. For the price, I guess you get what you pay for. It works in a pinch, but calling it a value is a stretch. The materials feel flimsy, like one wrong tug and the whole thing could snap. The extendable handle is awkwardly short, which makes no sense unless you're hunched over the whole time. I'm average height and it's just uncomfortable to use for more than a couple minutes. If you're only using it once in a blue moon, maybe it's okay, but for regular walks it's a letdown. Hard to feel like it's money well spent.

This strap worked just fine while I was on a river ride in Costa Rica. It also strapped right onto the helmet I used for the zip-line course. It allowed me to get some great footage of my friends while on vacation. Highly recommend.

On the plus side, this movie serves up the most beautiful images of Italy. In fact, Italy is the star here. And I completely enjoyed all of the Italian actors who played smaller roles. It's a pleasant, likeable, feel-good movie, and if that seems like damning with faint praise, that's because it is.. Very much a chick flick, which is not a put-down. (And when did movies about relationships, feelings, romance come to be something to sneer at, anyway? ) There are no wizards here, no space aliens, no explosions, no threats to the future of the planet. No violence at all. The actors are all fine and Vanessa Redgrave is, as always, superb. One exception is Christopher Egan, whose performance for most of the movie is over the top, which may be less inept acting than poor direction. That being said, here's the downside: It's going to remind you of a lightweight, made-for-tv romance of the type you can find on the Lifetime or Hallmark channel, just with a bigger budget. The intrusive candy-pop music selections can't help but point you in that direction and make you think that perhaps it's targeted to junior high schoolers. I found myself wondering how Vanessa Redgrave had wandered into a piece of fluff like this. The plot has more potential than substance as presented here and with each new development it's easy to predict what will happen next. No real drama, yet no comedy either. In fact, no tension, no suspense, no surprises, no energy or sizzle. Which is why the best I can say about it is that it's okay. Just okay. But I would have been angry had I spent $10 or $12 to see it in a theater. If you want to see a 'chick flick' that emotionally touches you, inspires you to think, has more than a passing impact, then I suggest you consider The Enchanted April or Mona Lisa Smile or the marvelous German film, Mostly Martha (the original, not the American remake).
Perfect for casual days out, would totally recommend to my friends.

You're at a party. Or maybe you're at a work event. And somebody spends the night trying to convince you of who they are. They're trying to convince you that they are honest or highly creative or a really, really involved parent. To paraphrase the bard, "I think thou tries to prove themselves too much." Whenever someone tries hard to sell themselves, to sell you on a notion of who they are, they are almost always never that person. That's all you can take away from one of those ambushes with any certainty. Why do I bring it up? This book is the exact opposite experience. Brett is never trying to convince you of anything. Story after story, she is nothing but humble and candid. It's really what elevates the book. It never reads too preachy and she never claims to know anymore than what her experiences have brought her. And, so many of her lessons come from those she has watched and studied over the years. Her time spent as a reporter works so nicely in this book. She is in every story, but never demands the attention or the spotlight. And, she never once tries to turn this into an "issues" book. She mentions her own terribly troubled past only when necessary and only in the increments needed to move the story along. This, I think, allows her own quiet yet clear voice to shine throughout. Simple, yet elegant. She must be one heck of a lady. She never tries to convince me of it, but it's what I walk away with. Nice, nice piece of writing. Chris Bowen Author of Our Kids: Building Relationships in the Classroom

I grabbed this set for a trip to the Keys last spring and have used it half a dozen times since. The dry snorkel has held up great, no cracking around the mouthpiece and the valve still seals out water cleanly. The mask took a couple of swims to break in, but now it's comfortable and hasn't fogged badly. The shorter fins are sturdy; I've scraped them over rocks a few times and they only have minor scuffs. They're not the most powerful for strong currents, but they're super convenient for travel. Overall, it's been a dependable kit that's survived being tossed in a beach bag all summer.

I've had these on for about six months of trail riding and they still bite hard with zero fade. No squealing, even after muddy descents and creek crossings. Rotor wear seems minimal too, which surprised me for the price. Gonna grab another pair just to have on hand when these eventually wear out.

I picked this up because my main tool just couldn't get into tight spots, and for that narrow use case it actually delivers. The slim profile lets me work nearly flush against surfaces, which saved me on a couple of trim jobs. That said, the overall experience is pretty frustrating. It's loud and heats up way faster than I expected, so I'm constantly pausing to let it cool down. Swapping it on and off feels like a wrestling match, nothing quick about it.
